entries.content: preposition ① (indicating possession, inclusion, qualities) …的 … de▸ the crew of the aircraft 全体机务人员▸ the legs of the table 桌子腿▸ there were five of us 我们有5个人▸ a man of courage 勇敢的男人 ② (indicating source) [表示来源]▸ the symphonies of Beethoven 贝多芬的交响乐 ③ (indicating identity) [表示同一所指]▸ the city of Rome 罗马城
